Okay, so email examples for your next steps. What I want to reiterate to you all is that the quickest way to ruin your reputation or to lose candidates is to have bad communication from the get-go, okay? Because first impressions matter. And so if somebody is going through your process and suddenly you ghost them, or if somebody is going through your process and you don't tell them what the next steps are, it's really unclear to them, it's really unsettling. And so they could quickly spread that reputation through your community. And that's why it's really important that you guys have these templates and you send something out, okay?
